function.message: I can’t safely execute this inbox request yet. I found no canonical project in `40_projects/` that matches “attic rainwater rig,” and “40k hobby lane” is also not an exact canonical project name. Please provide the exact project folder names (or confirm which two `40_projects/*/README.MD` records you mean), and I’ll compare start dates and process deletion accordingly.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system workflow docs before task work, treated inbox as non-canonical, and avoided destructive action without canonical identity confirmation.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION because the request references project names that cannot be fully resolved to canonical project records in `40_projects/`; deleting without unambiguous mapping would require guessing and violate canonical cross-check rules.
